title: Assertion failure when using `INNER JOIN` on `STARTSWITH`
description: The following test case crashed the monetdb server.
poc: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0 CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE  t0 (c0 VARCHAR(500) , c1 INT ) ;
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER  JOIN t0 ON STARTSWITH(((t0.c1)>=(t0.c0)), t1.c0, ('a' NOT LIKE(t0.c1)));
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN using STARTSWITH with incompatible data types
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0 CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 VARCHAR(500), c1 INT CHECK (c1 >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE);
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t0 ON STARTSWITH(t0.c0, CAST(t1.c0 AS VARCHAR));
